summary: Hyunwoo Kang, also known as the Alley Boss, successfully crosses the barrier into the Eastern Continent, earning prestigious new titles and stat boosts. During a live stream to his audience, he showcases a performance by his companion Tengi using a portable stage device. Upon arrival, he encounters a royal official and identifies himself as a Count and an adventurer, eventually revealing his immense power to prove his status.
key_moments: Hyunwoo earns the titles for being the first to cross the Balter and Cheonsan Mountains.
The Alley Boss hosts a live stream featuring a dance performance by Tengi.
Hyunwoo arrives at the Eastern Continent and reveals his identity and power to the third prince of the Ysmaion Empire.
